product_overview: RepoMind Backend ingests GitHub repositories, generates embeddings and AST-based dependency graphs, and exposes a retrieval-augmented streaming chat and repository inspection APIs for developer onboarding and code exploration.
core_goals: Ingest GitHub repositories, chunk content, compute embeddings, and persist vector documents for RAG.
Provide a streaming SSE chat endpoint that uses vector retrieval + Gemini for multi-turn developer assistance.
Expose repository-level utilities: AI-generated summary, starter suggestions, file retrieval, and AST dependency graphs.
Keep APIs simple and stateless (no auth required in current scope) and enable observability of ingestion and parsing outcomes.
Handle common error modes (missing params, non-ingested repos, external API failures) with clear HTTP responses.

features.name: Repository Ingestion
features.description: Fetch a GitHub repository tree, download relevant files, chunk text, compute embeddings with Gemini, and store repo files and embedding chunks in MongoDB for vector search.
user_flows: POST /api/ingest with body {"repoUrl":"https://github.com/owner/repo"} -> Receive 200 with JSON {"filesProcessed": <number>, "chunksCreated": <number>, "status":"completed"}
POST /api/ingest with body {} -> Receive 400 Bad Request with JSON {"error":"repoUrl required"}
POST /api/ingest with body {"repoUrl":"https://github.com/large/repo"} -> Receive 429 Too Many Requests with JSON {"error":"GitHub rate limit reached; provide auth or retry later"}

features.name: Streaming Chat
features.description: Start a retrieval-augmented streaming chat (SSE) that retrieves relevant chunks from the repo embeddings, injects context and history into Gemini, and streams partial model responses until completion.
user_flows: POST /api/chat with body {"repoUrl":"https://github.com/owner/repo","question":"How does authentication work?","history":[]} -> Receive 200 and open SSE stream that emits multiple 'data' events with partial model tokens and a final 'done' event containing the assembled answer and cited chunk references

POST /api/chat with body {"repoUrl":"https://github.com/owner/repo","question":"Where is the DB config?","history":[]} -> Receive 200 and open SSE stream; after final 'done' event client issues GET /api/file?repoUrl=https://github.com/owner/repo&filePath=config/db.js -> Receive 200 with {"content":"<file source>"}

POST /api/chat with body {"repoUrl":"https://github.com/not-ingested/repo","question":"Explain main module","history":[]} -> Receive 404 Not Found with JSON {"error":"No embeddings found for repo; ingest required"}
POST /api/chat with body {"repoUrl":"https://github.com/owner/repo","question":"","history":[]} -> Receive 400 Bad Request with JSON {"error":"question required"}

features.name: Repo Suggestions
features.description: Generate a short list of starter onboarding questions or exploration prompts for a repository using code context and README/package metadata.
user_flows: GET /api/suggestions -> Receive 400 Bad Request with JSON {"error":"repoUrl query parameter required"}
GET /api/suggestions?repoUrl=https://github.com/not-ingested/repo -> Receive 404 Not Found with JSON {"error":"Repository not ingested or not accessible"}

features.name: Repo Summary
features.description: Produce an AI-generated concise overview of the repository (README, package.json, top-level files) suitable for quick onboarding or executive summary.
user_flows: GET /api/summary -> Receive 400 Bad Request with JSON {"error":"repoUrl query parameter required"}
GET /api/summary?repoUrl=https://github.com/owner/repo -> Receive 502 Bad Gateway with JSON {"error":"LLM service unavailable; try again later"}

features.name: Repo Structure
features.description: Return an AST-based dependency graph and file tree that shows nodes (files/modules), edges (imports), and insights such as circular dependencies and highly connected components.
user_flows: GET /api/structure -> Receive 400 Bad Request with JSON {"error":"repoUrl query parameter required"}
GET /api/structure?repoUrl=https://github.com/owner/repo-with-unsupported-lang -> Receive 422 Unprocessable Entity with JSON {"error":"AST parsing failed or unsupported language"}

features.name: Repo File Retrieval
features.description: Return the raw source content of a specified file in the repository for inspection or to display in a UI editor pane.
user_flows: GET /api/file?repoUrl=https://github.com/owner/repo -> Receive 400 Bad Request with JSON {"error":"filePath query parameter required"}
GET /api/file?repoUrl=https://github.com/owner/repo&filePath=nonexistent.js -> Receive 404 Not Found with JSON {"error":"file not found in stored repo files"}
